notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin steals (15) 2nd base. Konnor Griffin to 3rd. Konnor Griffin advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher J.T. Realmuto.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Callihan grounds into a force out, first baseman Bryce Harper to shortstop Trea Turner. Ryan O'Hearn scores. Esmerlyn Valdez scores. Endy Rodríguez out at 2nd. Tyler Callihan to 1st. Throwing error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: Nick Gonzales pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: J.T. Realmuto challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Nick Gonzales called out on strikes.
